person.name: Alice Wonderland
person.description: Software developer specializing in XML databases and XQuery.

person.name: Bob Springfield
person.description: Database administrator working with eXist-db and native XML storage.

person.description: Digital humanities researcher using TEI and XQuery for text analysis.

person.description: Librarian managing digital collections with XML and metadata standards.
